scheduleExport.description: Late season schedule pulled from the personal calendar. Work shifts, custody time, and the boys events for November and December 2026.

event.title: Custody weekend, my weekend
event.detail: Pick up the boys at 5:30 from Megan, pizza Friday, church and lunch at Patricia Sunday.

event.title: Tyler tournament, all day
event.detail: Attending on a custody weekend. Bring water and snacks.

event.title: On call week, primary
event.detail: Carry the on call phone, keep it charged, van stocked. Heavy no heat calls expected.

event.title: Birthday
event.detail: Kept off primary on call this week. Quiet dinner with the boys if it lands on custody time.

event.title: Custody weekend
event.detail: Return the boys to Megan by 6:00 Sunday.

event.title: Thanksgiving, split day
event.detail: Noon handoff. Lunch with me, dinner with Megan. Family gathering at Patricia.

event.title: Monthly budget review
event.detail: Check savings balance and confirm Tyler basketball fund is covered.

event.title: Boys winter break begins
event.detail: Adjust custody plan for the break and coordinate with Megan on weekdays.

event.title: On call week, holiday premium
event.detail: Holiday week rotation. Premium pay. Keep the phone close.
